idea-plugin.name: jako headless J2K driver
idea-plugin.description:
Drives the bundled JetBrains Java→Kotlin converter (J2K) from a headless IntelliJ instance. Registered as the `jakoConvert` ApplicationStarter: pass `<java_in> <kt_out>` as args and the plugin writes the converted Kotlin to <kt_out>.
Only loaded by the jako orchestrator's `headless_idea` j2k.strategy.
